kpis.title: Output Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("tokens/output", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Input Token Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("tokens/input", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Requests In-Flight
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("requests_inflight" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("requests/success", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Error Rate
kpis.sql:
SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t,
       irate_1s("requests/error", timestamp)
         / NULLIF(irate_1s("requests/sent", timestamp), 0) AS v
FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Error Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("requests/error", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Timeout Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("requests/timeout", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Canceled Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("requests/canceled", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Time to First Token (TTFT)
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("ttft:buckets",
                  LAG("ttft:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.95)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: Time per Output Token (TPOT)
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("tpot:buckets",
                  LAG("tpot:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.95)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL
